description: Character roll probabilities in the Roblox game (学乱) Gakuran. Only officially published numbers are included: the rarity-tier drop rates. Per-style, per-height, and per-race odds have not been published by the developers, so they are null rather than guessed. Qualitative height correlations confirmed by the developers/community are carried in `note` fields without invented percentages.

ethnicities.name: African
ethnicities.note: Tends to roll taller heights more often than other races (qualitative, no published percentage).

ethnicities.name: European
ethnicities.note: Tends to roll taller heights more often than other races (qualitative, no published percentage).

ethnicities.name: Indian
ethnicities.note: Rolls taller heights the least often among all races (qualitative, no published percentage).
